Cleo Partners company
offers you comprehensive
cooperation on platforms
Uber, Bolt, Free Now, Uber Eats,
Bolt Food.
home.about_p2:
More than 2000 satisfied drivers
all over Poland are already working with us and earning daily.
home.work_title:
Working with us you keep
all the benefits of a taxi
driver
home.work_p1:
You have the opportunity to set your own
working schedule and get your earned money
daily.
home.work_p2:
Only 4 documents separate you from an ordinary
person and an employee of our company.
home.work_p3:
You can work on your own or rented
car from our fleet, or from a fleet
outside the company.
home.review_p1: A few months ago, I became a driver for Cleo Partners. The guys are very young and persistent. At first, I was skeptical, as the rental cost seemed a bit high to me.
home.review_p2: But after a month, I realized that everything has its price. The results they delivered in a short period, 2 months, surprised me. Everything is clear, transparent, detailed reports and control of business processes. Administratively, if any questions arose, they were resolved within minutes or hours.
home.req_1:
The car must be 4-door,
left-hand drive.
home.req_2:
To work in Bolt service you need:
— Car from 2001
home.req_3:
To work in Uber, Free Now service you need:
— Car from 2006

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What are the requirements for working as a courier?
faq.a1: All you need is your international passport and driver's license (if delivering by car).
faq.q2: Is a car required for delivery work?
faq.a2: No, you can use a bicycle, scooter, or our cars, as well as work on foot in certain areas.
faq.q3: Where can I get a delivery bag?
faq.a3: We provide a thermal bag after registration and activation of the courier profile.
faq.form_title:
Still have questions,
that are not answered
here?
faq.form_sub: Submit a request and our manager will call you back and answer
